title: School Parent Enquiry AI — School FAQ Schema
description: Structured, per-school FAQ knowledge base. One document per school. Injected into the front office AI prompt as the school knowledge block. Adding or editing FAQs never requires a code change.

school_id.description: Stable unique id for the school (matches schools.id in Supabase).

version.description: Increment on every edit; used for cache invalidation of the injected knowledge block.

locale.description: Language of these FAQ answers. MVP: 'en'. Future: 'ta', 'ta-en' (Tanglish).

id.description: Stable id for the FAQ entry, e.g. 'fee_structure'.

category.description: FAQ category — mirrors the WhatsApp main menu 1:1 and the school_faqs_category_check constraint (supabase/migrations/0012_rename_clinic_to_school.sql). Aligned with docs/02-product/INTENTS.md.

answer.description: The approved answer. Must be short and factual. The front office AI paraphrases this warmly but must not contradict it or invent beyond it.

requires_staff.description: If true, the front office AI defers to the school office instead of answering directly (e.g. exact fee amounts, certificate processing).

faqs.question: How do I apply for admission?
faqs.answer: Share your child's name, age, and the grade you are applying for, and our admissions office will guide you through the next steps.

faqs.question: What is the fee structure?
faqs.answer: Fees vary by grade. Our admissions office will share the exact fee structure for the grade you are enquiring about.

faqs.question: What are the school timings?
faqs.answer: We are open Monday to Saturday, 9 AM to 4 PM. We are closed on Sundays.

faqs.question: Is school bus transport available?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer bus transport on select routes. Share your area and our office will confirm if a route covers it.

faqs.question: When is the next holiday?
faqs.answer: Our academic calendar lists all holidays and events. Our office can share the current term's calendar with you.

faqs.question: What facilities does the school have?
faqs.answer: Our campus has a library, science and computer labs, a playground, and a sports ground.

faqs.question: How do I contact the school office?
faqs.answer: You can continue chatting here, and our office team will also be happy to speak with you directly.

faqs.question: How do I get a transfer certificate?
faqs.answer: Transfer and bonafide certificates are issued by our office on request. Our office will guide you through the process.

faqs.question: Where is the school located?
faqs.answer: We are at 45, College Road, Madurai. A Google Maps link is shared on request.

faqs.question: What curriculum/board do you follow?
faqs.answer: We follow the CBSE curriculum from Kindergarten through Grade 12.
